name: Wood Turret
notes: Treehouse's specialty defense, in addition to the generic Turret/Missile Launcher every base gets. A Turret variant (see "extends") carrying over Wood Tower's identity wholesale — same base stats (low damage, fast attack speed) and same addsTurretPerLevel mechanic (each upgrade level adds an independently-targeting turret instead of scaling its own damage/hp), so a maxed-out Wood Turret clears a swarm of weak/fast units (matching Treehouse's Quad-bike-heavy garrison) rather than focus-firing a single strong threat. Fire-vulnerable like every other Wood structure (Wood Tower/Wall/Dock/Bridge). Unlike standalone Tower, this is tied to a base (populationCost 1, normal ruin/rebuild rules apply on destruction) and single-material — no Stone/Steel variant, since Treehouse already gets the generic Turret for a non-Wood-flavored defense.
